mapper.select: SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_code, p.specification, p.product_type, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, oi.subtotal, oi.production_status, oi.sort_order, oi.remark, oi.created_at FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.sort_order ASC, oi.created_at ASC
